name: agile-workflow
description: Markdown-based work-tracking substrate for AI-driven projects. Sibling to workflow — items as files in .work/, late-binding releases, gates that produce items, autopilot queue runner.

interface.longDescription: 26 skills for substrate-driven work tracking. Items as files in .work/, late-binding releases, gates that produce items (security, tests, cruft, docs, patterns), autopilot queue runner. Sibling to workflow.
defaultPrompt: Use agile-workflow to inspect the substrate queue and recommend the next ready item.
